project_type: React + TypeScript + Vite board game (Rising Sun adaptation)
build_system: Vite with tsc -b for type checking
test_framework: No test framework installed (no test files exist)
test_command: No tests - rely on build passing
verification_instructions: Run npm run build - note there are pre-existing TS errors in BattleBiddingOverlay.tsx and BattlePanel.tsx related to dynamic TranslationKey types. These are NOT introduced by our changes.
environment_constraints: No test framework. Verification is via TypeScript compilation and code review.
key_patterns: Game logic in src/utils/gameLogic.ts (pure functions that take/return GameState). Store in src/store/gameStore.ts (Zustand). UI in src/components/. i18n in src/i18n/en.ts and es.ts. Log entries use player names which are auto-colored by GameLog.tsx renderLogEntry() function. Types in src/types/game.ts. AllianceProposal interface defines alliance proposal shape.
directory_structure: src/utils/gameLogic.ts = main game logic, src/types/game.ts = type definitions, src/components/ = React components, src/store/ = Zustand store, src/i18n/ = translations (en.ts, es.ts, index.ts)
